title: TNT's PvP Crosshair
description: Has a nice PvP crosshair, just like my one in 75TN57's Resources!
body: This PvP crosshair resource pack is here for a crosshair like my one in 1.21.5 for 75TNT57's Resources, although it has a different attack charge indicator. It has a sleek design to let you see the center, while also knowing what you will hit. The attack indicator charge is a simple, sleek line, that has the indicator of a black hole sort of shape.
